21.reason: [The judge function is called with arguments in wrong order (should be first[i-1], first[i+1]), but more critically, it does not ensure both characters are of the same type鈥攅.g., 'a' and 'Z' would incorrectly return 1. 23.reason: [No validation that first[i+1] > first[i-1]; if not, loop condition fails or behaves unexpectedly. Also, if characters are not of same type (due to flawed judge), expansion still occurs incorrectly.]
